readings.Aries: You are capable of more gentleness than you usually show. Today would be a good day for it. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Taurus: Someone is waiting for you to say what you mean. The long way around is costing you both. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Gemini: There's a feeling underneath the thinking. Stop analysing it long enough to feel it. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Cancer: You have been protecting others from your feelings. Consider the cost of that protection. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Leo: The spotlight is available today. The question is what you want to do in it. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Virgo: The thing you've been editing is ready. Publishing it is the harder work and it's time. The first instinct was right.
readings.Libra: The person you've been gentle with needs something less gentle today. You can do that. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Scorpio: Your silence is more legible than you think. What you're not saying has already been read. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Sagittarius: What you're searching for is real. It is also closer than the direction you're searching in. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Capricorn: You are more resilient than the people around you know, because you don't show the load. Show some of the load. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Aquarius: Your need for intellectual stimulation is as real as any physical need. Feed it properly today. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Pisces: There is something you've been trying to hold together that wants to fall apart constructively. Let it. The energy available today is better used gently.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
